free_text: Production rate of proton-induced isotopes in different
The errors associated to the calculated
production cross section values have been estimated by
taking into account only the statistical errors
-By compiler. Very much cases are presented, which have
not any explanation for excluding product production
due to radioactive decay of precursors.
Many REACTION and DECAY-DATA are changed.
isotope at SUBENT 006 was changed on 73-TA-182-M2
